form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished last in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 340m at this track behind Denawen Beach beaten 2 lengths (20.55). Looks a strong winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished last in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 340m at this track behind Denawen Beach beaten 2 lengths (20.55). Looks a strong winning hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was bumped and became unbalanced over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (20.87) in a Grade 5, finishing a 11 length seventh. Yet to miss the frame from four starts from the draw, including two wins. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Finished third last start (20.49) at big odds over 340m at this track. Has a low draw. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third last start (20.49) at big odds over 340m at this track. Has a low draw. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (20.37) when fourth over 340m at this track in a Grade 5. Has one success and two minors from five starts from box 4. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: At the last start finished last in a Grade 4/5 on March 28 over 400m at Dubbo behind Nangar Mcgraw beaten 18 lengths (24.11). Can bounce back. One of the main chances.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. Last start finished fourth over 300m at Taree Super Track, beaten 9 lengths. Not keen, needs to lift.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 431m at this track beaten 5 lengths (25.52) behind My Irish in a Grade 5 on April 11. Happy to overlook recent efforts. Well placed and gets chance to find best.
